hero.headline: Your perfect Thai vacation, planned in seconds.
hero.subheadline: Tell our AI your destination, budget, and travel style. Get a complete day-by-day plan with a live map — 100% free.

plan.province: Where do you want to go?

home.how_it_works_subtitle: Three simple steps to your perfect tropical getaway.
home.step1_desc: Choose your province, travel dates, budget, and style — culture, nature, food, or nightlife.
home.step2_desc: Our AI analyzes thousands of options and crafts a day-by-day plan made just for you.
home.step3_desc: Your entire itinerary appears on an interactive map with booking links for every activity.
home.dest_subtitle: Discover the most stunning regions in Thailand, handpicked for your next adventure.

places.hero_desc: Handpicked restaurants, hotels, activities, and attractions for your perfect itinerary.
